title: Extracellular Vesicles - Basics and Analysis
author: Maja Kosanović
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: On June 21, the 2nd IPANEMA Invited SOL on Extracellular Vesicles - Basics and Analysis was organized. The lecture has been given by Dr. Maja Kosanovic from the Institute for Application of Nuclear Energy, University of Belgrade.
